title: Jarul’s Legend Is Challenged
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Hajrudin, Unknown person #1, Kashi, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Jarul as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Please snap out of it, Captains!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Jarul is the world's oldest warrior! He's a living legend!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've always looked up to him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the elder we all idolized is just a broken old man now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why it's up to us to put him out to pasture! And after that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will reign as Kings!! Elbaf has no need for idols or gods!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is time to call forth a new era of war!! An age ruled by the strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can you say that?! this isn't you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the hell happened to you guys?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stay back, Kashi!!! They've flipped!! They're NOT the same people anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've become pitch-black demons, right down to their core!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, wait!! Stop!! I don't want to flip too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're in a bad position here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems the enemy took down G'iaban too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The giant warrior pirates have become complete demons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's right, wake up!! Come to life!!

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
